text.title: Autonomous Agents Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure from goal to a shippable autonomous-agent spec.

step.name: confirm-shape
step.action: Verify shape decision (see [[agent-shape-decision-frame]]) lands on autonomous-agent or autonomous-multi-agent.

step.name: pick-pattern
step.action: Apply [[agent-patterns]] to pick ReAct / Plan-and-Execute / Reflexion.

step.name: design-subagent-roles
step.action: For Plan-and-Execute: planner (opus), executor pool (sonnet/haiku), verifier (sonnet), critic (sonnet). For Reflexion: actor + critic. Pin models per role.

step.name: classify-tools-and-checkpoints
step.action: For each tool, classify idempotency: idempotent / dedup-keyed / non-idempotent. Decide human_checkpoint_per_action.
step.decision-gate: Any non-idempotent tool MUST have human-checkpoint=required OR dedup key.

step.name: set-caps-and-terminal
step.action: Set max_iterations, max_attempts, max_steps as applicable. Define deterministic terminal_condition.

step.name: validate-and-ship
step.action: Run scripts/validate-output.py; route to eng owner; on sign-off, hand to implementation.
